task_completion.description: Verify the forensic case 'Targeted_Triage_2024' was created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Autopsy application window showing the case name 'Targeted_Triage_2024' in the title bar or case dashboard.

task_completion.description: Verify the disk image was added as a data source.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'ntfs_undel.dd' listed under the 'Data Sources' node in the Autopsy tree viewer on the left panel.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Config_And_Logs' interesting file set was defined with the correct extensions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Autopsy 'Interesting Files' configuration window or ingest module settings showing a rule set named 'Config_And_Logs' targeting 'txt', 'log', and 'xml' extensions.

task_completion.description: Verify the Hash Lookup and Interesting Files Identifier ingest modules were run.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the ingest module selection screen with 'Hash Lookup' and 'Interesting Files Identifier' checked, an ingest progress bar, or populated results under the 'Interesting Items' node in the Autopsy tree viewer.

task_completion.description: Verify the TSV catalog of flagged files was created with the correct headers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor, terminal, or spreadsheet application displaying the contents of 'flagged_items.tsv' with the exact header: 'FILENAME\tFULL_PATH\tSIZE_BYTES\tMD5_HASH\tEXTENSION' and populated data rows.

task_completion.description: Verify the triage summary text file was created with the required information.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor or terminal displaying 'triage_summary.txt' containing the case number (INV-TRG-001), set name (Config_And_Logs), total flagged files count, specific counts for txt, log, and xml, and a brief conclusion.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually used the Autopsy GUI to process the evidence.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Autopsy graphical interface (creating the case, adding the data source, running ingest modules) rather than just writing text files from a terminal.

integrity.description: Verify the TSV file contains actual extracted data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'flagged_items.tsv' file should contain realistic file names, paths, byte sizes, and MD5 hashes corresponding to the disk image, not just empty rows or placeholder text.

integrity.description: Verify the summary file contains actual calculated counts.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'triage_summary.txt' file should contain actual numerical values for the file counts, rather than copied prompt instructions or placeholder text like '[insert count]'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Case Name: Targeted_Triage_2024. Case Number: INV-TRG-001. Disk Image: /home/ga/evidence/ntfs_undel.dd. Set Name: Config_And_Logs. Target Extensions: txt, log, xml. Output TSV: /home/ga/Reports/flagged_items.tsv. Output Summary: /home/ga/Reports/triage_summary.txt. The TSV must have the header: FILENAME\tFULL_PATH\tSIZE_BYTES\tMD5_HASH\tEXTENSION.
